scripts.dev:api: cd apps/api && uv run python manage.py runserver 0.0.0.0:8000
scripts.docker:db: cd apps/api && docker compose up db
scripts.migrate: cd apps/api && uv run python manage.py migrate
scripts.makemigrations: cd apps/api && uv run python manage.py makemigrations
scripts.api:shell: cd apps/api && uv run python manage.py shell
scripts.api:superuser: cd apps/api && uv run python manage.py createsuperuser
